title: models validation types/methods are dead code
evidence: models/book.go:21-56 defines CreateBookRequest/UpdateBookRequest and Validate()/ValidatePartial(), but handlers/books.go:33-52 and :111-146 reimplement decoding+validation inline and never reference them
suggestion: Either wire the handlers to models.*Request + Validate()/ValidatePartial() or delete the unused types to avoid drift

title: PUT supports partial updates (beyond spec)
evidence: handlers/books.go:111-156 decodes into a map and applies only supplied fields; db/database.go:139-172 merges onto the existing row
suggestion: None — noted as an enhancement beyond the TASK.md requirement

title: DB path and port are configurable via env vars
evidence: main.go:15-18 (DB_PATH) and main.go:42-45 (PORT) with sensible defaults
